item.title: The 529th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - Pride Month 2025 ep 19
item.description:
(This is 100% accurate) Just 3 Dump Days left of SUPER GAY MEEMAYS!
I just ordered a yard sign with this text on it
LGBTQIA+-misia, that's why
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you either when I post or when I go Viral. If you wish to chat, I'm frequently in ElbowDeepInAHorse (The Stable) and PotatoCheesMonk's (Deviousness) Discord Servers between the hours of 7pm and 1am GMT-5 during the week, and at unpredictable but frequent times Saturdays and Sundays. https://discord.gg/JoinTheStable https://discord.gg/Deviousness These are both VERY safe places for LGBTQIA+ people, if you need a community, please stop in! AbbiiStabbii's server is also amazing, *especially* safe for Trans folk. @PlanckEraWasMyBestEra also has a server for Parents who are Trans https://discord.me/transparents
To all the anti-El Gibbities
mmmmmmmm
@TheSmogMonster Ace Meme!
PRO: Lots of sandwiches CON: What do we do with all these sandwiches?!
Do this to multiple family members separately
Gritty says LGBTQIA+ Rights!
The problem with this is that all the morons that were dumb enough to believe these lies in the first place will think this is a confession.
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #LGBTQIA #PrideMonth #Pride_Month #Pride #LGBTPride #Phone_Dump #Meme_Dump #Memes #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple #GregFromHR #SteveFromAccounting #DougFromSales
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon

item.title: Did this actually happen?

item.title: Dehya cosplay by me :3

item.title: CLEVER
item.dc:creator: SlyPhinleyTheFirst

item.title: Memes vol 579 Weeping
item.description:
This is a collection of images and words that make me feel like weeping- it’s mostly from joy
https://imgur.com/gallery/lnloF4X volume 1
I went to the museum today and wanted to cry because they were playing ancient tribal music and a bunch of little kids were dancing to it. It was just so beautiful
This is my most favorite picture in the whole world I want it on my grave
This is the whole reason I posted this dump. This was Lilly- she was my childhood dog and this is my favorite picture of her. I took it on my flip phone and I thought it was lost forever but my mom had it saved and sent it to me. I’m so happy I have it once again.
She was the cutest
I wrote this about her freshman year of high school. She died a little over a year later
Paulie tax. He’s making a face similar to one Lilly used to make and that made me want to cry too
Bruce tax
Big Mama tax
Nessie tax
Froggy and Liza Jane tax
Scruffy tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: After all, why not? Why shouldn’t I make room on my phone by dumping memes? Volume 37
item.description:
I fucking love cheese!
I also love FOB!
Yes please
On it!
I really fucking love cheese!
Yay!….oh :(
I audibly laugh every single time I see this meme
Going to the UK is on my bucket list
Stay fresh, cheesebags!

item.title: What Happened Today #146
item.description: Power is cashing in while cracking down. Trump’s family hijacks war buzz for a Tel Aviv tower, rebrands imported phones as American miracles, then his administration punishes unions, journalists, and immigrant families that dare ask why. Stop this profit driven autocracy before it locks us out of our own democracy. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at https://govbrief.today or find us on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/khamenei-one-week 2. https://go.govbrief.today/us-iran-talks-war-over 3. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-netanyahu-trial 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-threatens-spain 5. https://go.govbrief.today/kennedy-withdraws-international-funding 6. https://go.govbrief.today/acip-meeting-chaotic 7. https://go.govbrief.today/eeoc-fires-ortiz 8. https://go.govbrief.today/california-transgender-sports 9. https://go.govbrief.today/faith-leaders-sue-over-commanments 10. https://go.govbrief.today/congress-iran-briefing 11. https://go.govbrief.today/gabbard-new-intel 12. https://go.govbrief.today/powell-successor-early 13. https://go.govbrief.today/bove-denies-wrongdoing 14. https://go.govbrief.today/doj-sues-maryland-bench 15. https://go.govbrief.today/abrego-garice-release-delayed 16. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-blocks-transaction-monitoring 17. https://go.govbrief.today/new-militarized-zones 18. https://go.govbrief.today/florida-second-immigration-camp 19. https://go.govbrief.today/cudahy-vicemayor-gangs 20. https://go.govbrief.today/doj-sues-mn-tuition 21. https://go.govbrief.today/job-corps-prelim-injunction 22. https://go.govbrief.today/collective-bargaining-injunction 23. https://go.govbrief.today/hud-displacing-nsf 24. https://go.govbrief.today/voa-hearing-job-loss 25. https://go.govbrief.today/fire-bertrand-trump 26. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-mobile-drops-america-claim 27. https://go.govbrief.today/israel-hotel-trump Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/trump-impeachment-vote Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/national-guard-sons-accompany-mother Subscribe Free - https://govbrief.today
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: A convicted felon wants to deport hard working, tax paying employees from the country. Make it make sense!
item.dc:creator: Xalten2

item.title: Peaches
item.description:
If peaches had arms surely they would hold one another in their peach sleep.
And if peaches had feet it is sure they would nudge one another with their soft peachy feet.
And if peaches could they would sleep with their dimpled head on the other’s each to each.
Like you and me.
And sleep and sleep.
ART: https://bsky.app/profile/AidenR0.bsky.social POEM: Peaches - Six in a Tin Bowl, Sarajevo
item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.dc:creator: onushka

item.title: Luna Snow - Marvel Rivals Cosplay
item.description:
My LUna SNow cosplay from Marvel Rivals! I love having my own studio now, makes shooting the cosplay so fun with all the options I have! Luna was a blast, despite my entire depth perception being tweaked by only one colored contact... I saw everything in 3D vision... Also, for those interested, go check out my new youtube channel, it has really been taking off lately and I have so much planned for upcoming vids on it that I know a lot of you will enjoy!: https://www.youtube.com/@alsoashleyb Cheers everyone!
Reference Image!
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: It was meant to be an experiment...for science
